title: Sewage
description: Adds a procedurally generated dungeon with monsters to fight and unique treasures to gather!
body:
# -!IMPORTANT!-
This mod will no longer be updated, as I made it a while ago and it is no longer up to my standards, so it will be archived.
## Read before downloading
Previous Versions of this mod included stolen assets from the Create Mod. I have since patched this out, but I would like to apologize. Create is my favorite mod and me stealing textures from it was a disservice to the developers I have so much respect for.
# Sewage
### IMPORTANT: THIS DUNGEON IS MADE TO BE TAKEN ON WHEN THE PLAYER HAS AQUIRED IRON ARMOR AND TOOLS!
**(You should also use a shield :P)**
## Sewers
Sewage adds new dungeon called the Sewers, with monsters to fight and loot to obtain.
## New Blocks/Items
Sewage adds a Stone Tiles block set, based on the Cut Copper textures.
Sewage also adds Pizza, which has very high saturation. It also adds a new weapon called a Splintered Cane, which has long reach and moderate attack speed.
## Mobs in the Sewer Trial Spawners:
-Slime  
-Zombie  
-Skeleton  
-Spider  
-Witch  
-Bogged

# -Lore-
Long ago, in the time of heroes, the Witches of the overworld used Iron Golems corrupted by The Orb of Dominance to build the Sewers, a containment where they could dump their potions without having negative environmental effects, creating the Runoff. 

Later on, a patrol of Illagers discovered the abandoned Trial Chambers, a training ground used to strengthen the forces of the Heroes. They reported back to the Arch Illager, who then instructed the Witches to reverse engineer the Trial Spawners. They put the newly created Trial Spawners into the Sewers as a way to punish the villagers they captured in Raids.  

Captured Villagers would be knocked into the Runoff by the monsters created by Trial Spawners, and they would mutate into the Ravagers. The Ravagers would slaughter remaining Villagers, and then be taken back to Illager bases, creating a cycle of torture for unfortunate Villager souls. Villagers that managed to escape into the tunnels of the Sewers would construct Hideouts, with delicacies such as Pizza being cooked as a way to stay happy under the stressful circumstances, with them obtaining ingredients from the Trial Spawners. Unfortunately, the door to the Hideouts would be broken down by the Ravagers, and the Villagers were killed.

After the Arch Illager was defeated, the Sewers would be abandoned, with all of their treasure left inside...
